description_long: This is a metallic adjustable wrench with a long, straight handle and a crescent-shaped jaw at one end. The jaw features a visible adjustment screw, allowing the opening width to be changed for gripping various sizes of nuts and bolts. The surface of the wrench appears to be made of steel, showing a slightly worn, matte finish with some minor discoloration, suggesting regular use. The handle is solid and tapers gently towards the end, with no visible grip pattern or rubberized sections. The overall color is a muted metallic gray, with some areas appearing darker due to shadows or surface wear. There are no visible brand markings or logos on the body of the wrench.
description: A metallic adjustable wrench with a straight handle and crescent-shaped jaw, featuring a visible adjustment screw and a matte, slightly worn finish.
description_view_0: The wrench is seen from an angle highlighting the length of the handle and the side profile of the adjustable jaw.
description_view_1: This top-down view shows the full length of the handle and the flat, broad surface of the wrench, with the adjustment screw visible near the jaw.
description_view_2: A perspective view focusing on the open end of the jaw and the adjustment mechanism, with the handle receding into the background.
description_view_3: The wrench is shown from a low angle, emphasizing the underside of the jaw and the thickness of the handle.
attribute_rust_or_wear_marks: Minor surface discoloration and wear marks, mostly on the handle and jaw edges.
